extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won stage 3 sprint after Quickstep's Sabatini pulled off too early, leaving Kittel exposed for 500m
tactical_patterns: Quickstep's Sabatini leadout pulled off 500m too early, killing Kittel's sprint from wind exposure.
Bora successfully shielded Bennett through chaotic finale after Katusha appeared to control at 1.5km.
Pre-race GC favorites heavily fractured by Stage 3: Bardet DQ'd, Porte -15min before decisive mountain stages.

rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: left exposed in wind for 500m after Sabatini's early pull-off, faded badly before line
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: best opening days of any GC contender, enters Stage 4 ITT in strong position despite being only decent TTer
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: solid through opening chaos at only -23sec, flagged as new overall favorite despite Sky's typical conservative approach
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: already -15min eliminates pre-race favorite before GC stages even begin
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: disqualified Stage 1, defending KOM jersey instead of GC contention
